---
title: "<i>Guardian, The</i>"
---

## <i>Guardian, The</i>

**Type:** periodical

### About

This was a High Church weekly newspaper which ran 1846-1951, and is not to be confused with the daily newspaper formerly known as the <i>Manchester Guardian</i> which changed its name to <i>The Guardian </i>in 1959.  The High Church <i>Guardian</i> had been founded by a group of Tractarians including CMY’s friend Lord Blachford.  She herself seems to have regularly read it and also reviewed for it, but the precise extent of her involvement with it remains to be charted.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization

- [To Sir Walter Besant, Febry 7th [1899?][[footnote:1]]](../letters/3394_To_Sir_Walter_Besant.html)
- [To Christabel Rose Coleridge, Oct 19 [1898]](../letters/3386_To_Christabel_Rose_Coleridge.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
